text:
Market today: Tech is getting hit hard again. AI sentiment is cracking - OpenAI IPO uncertainty is spooking the whole AI/chip complex, and that's the core of your book. On a margin account, this kind of broad tech selling compounds fast.

Your holdings: PLTR is your biggest problem - down 17.6% and scanner says SELL; it's bleeding with no floor in sight yet. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.2% and flagged TRIM - that's real dollar damage on a big weight. SPAL is a 2x leveraged SpaceX ETF, already down 16.5%, and headline 10 says space stocks are getting crushed broadly - leveraged decay makes this worse every red day.

Watch: (1) How deep this tech selloff goes into Friday - headline 9 flags Friday as one of the biggest volume days of the year, which can accelerate moves either way. (2) AVGO specifically - largest position, on margin, flagged TRIM; a break toward $336 stop would hurt the whole account.

Bottom line: You have three bleeding positions on a margin account in a sector that's actively selling off - PLTR, AVGO, and SPAL need a decision today, not tomorrow.
